steps.title: Slope of r, then negative reciprocal for perpendicular s
steps.content: Line $r$ through $(2, 16)$ and $(7, 17)$: slope $= \frac{17-16}{7-2} = \frac{1}{5}$. Perpendicular slope $= -\frac{1}{(1/5)} = -5$.

steps.title: Equation of line s through (1, 2) with slope −5
Scale to match ax + 7y = c
steps.content: Multiply $5x + y = 7$ by 7: $35x + 7y = 49$, so $c = 49$. That matches choice 49 — 49 is correct.
